zoneCards.label: Dubai
zoneCards.title: City stays and business movement
zoneCards.copy: The broadest route for hotels, residences, resorts and executive meetings across the city.

zoneCards.label: Abu Dhabi
zoneCards.title: Capital arrivals and longer routes
zoneCards.copy: Best when the booking stretches beyond Dubai and needs calmer intercity planning.

zoneCards.label: DXB / DWC
zoneCards.title: Airport arrival handovers
zoneCards.copy: Built around flight timing, terminal access and the transition into the hotel or residence.

zoneCards.label: Hotels / residences
zoneCards.title: Resort, villa and branded residence delivery
zoneCards.copy: Especially relevant across Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, JBR and central premium districts.

processSteps.title: Choose the city or airport
processSteps.copy: Start with Dubai, Abu Dhabi, DXB or DWC before worrying about the final street-level detail.

processSteps.title: Share the handover style
processSteps.copy: Hotel, residence, resort, terminal or business address changes the best delivery route.

processSteps.title: Let one team coordinate the timing
processSteps.copy: That keeps the route, documents and return plan consistent from the first contact.
